All right, tell me some about this previous sales experience, revenue produce, what product were you selling at the price point? Generally, how many products did you get per day, per week? How many did you make offers do? How many did you close? You know, we want to see like how well they, if they have previous sales experience, or maybe sales experience for their own business, how well they know their numbers. Now, if they don't know their numbers, like to the T, you know, if they don't know exactly how many appointments they got four weeks ago, then, you know, that's a little bit of a red flag, but they should be able to tell you in generalities. Typically, I would get this many a week, maybe this many a day out of those, these amount of, you know, I probably make offers to this amount and then close this amount. And everything should kind of add up here to the commissions that they were making, the revenue that they were generating, the appointments they were getting,

and they should be able to talk about this without just being all over the place. Don't expect them to know it exactly. Okay.
